programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s overhaul day on Boom America, and the A-Team gets to work. Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail kick things off with Switch It Up, laying out strategies around “The Volume” while Kyle Reyes pushes for a powerful pivot—refocusing the company squarely on the booming trades community. Next, the team digs into Raida Tech, where Laura highlights how the company is operating 25 years ahead of the curve but desperately needs clearer marketing to match its groundbreaking innovation. American Stories creator Bob Cefail stops by to share the inspiration behind Boom America and the future of independent production in the U.S. From there, the A-Team turns to Tangible Assets, helping refine how Dale can monetize his coin collection business, boost credibility, and reach the right investors. Finally, New Home National Title gets a full diagnostic from the experts as they map out how the company can scale, gain visibility, and earn the recognition it deserves nationwide.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode of Boom America dives headfirst into the businesses modernizing America’s energy and infrastructure landscape. The A-Team kicks things off with Switch It Up, breaking down how smart energy upgrades - like high-efficiency lighting, EV charging, and electrical modernization - are helping companies cut costs and stay competitive. Next, the focus shifts to Raida Tech, where the team highlights a company operating years ahead of the market but in need of sharper messaging to fully unlock its potential. From there, Tangible Assets, LLC takes center stage as the experts help refine its positioning, credibility, and growth strategy in a crowded investment space. Finally, New Home National Title gets a no-nonsense diagnostic as the team maps out a clear path to scale, increase visibility, and claim its place as a national contender. From practical innovation to bold business strategy, this episode proves that the future of American enterprise is powered by smart decisions and even smarter execution.

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: In the season premiere of Farm Hero, host Laura Zaspel scours the country for the best farming practices and the people behind them. Her search winds her up in Gunnison Colorado at Parker pastures. Bill Parker and his daughters are fighting desertification with their grass-fed livestock. Using a collaboration with local farmers, Bill fights against the stigma of livestock farming with a holistic approach. Parker pastures breathes new air into the concept of farm-to-table.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Ever-increasing rainfall, coupled with monocultural farming, is eradicating the topsoil in Iowa farms. With an estimate that all topsoil in the area will be gone within 35 years, the race is on to change farming culture. Elizabeth Garst and her farm are at the forefront of the fight to educate farmers and the public on the necessity of cover crops and soil health. Elizabeth’s ancestors turned Dust Bowl land into a thriving farm with morals, and she’s not stopping there.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.desc:
Locked On HBCU host Darrion "Mouth of the South" Gray breaks down all of the sports news around the HBCU landscape. Darrion, a Texas Southern alum and former TSU Herald sports editor, is dedicated to giving a fair and in-depth look at all the talent across HBCU sports—not just the big schools like Southern University, Grambling University, and Alabama A&M. It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. programme.title: S1E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Join “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson and a fearless team of conservationists on an epic mission to protect the planet’s most majestic and endangered predators. From rescuing lions at the Kevin Richardson Wildlife Sanctuary in South Africa to safeguarding orangutans and Cape Griffons in the wilds of Indonesia, witness heart-pounding rescues, fierce battles against exploitation, and inspiring stories of survival. This is conservation at its most daring—unmissable, unforgettable, and truly wild.

programme.title: S2E1 Adventure Series

It’s the ultimate fusion of wildlife wonder and high-octane thrills—you won’t be able to look away.

programme.desc: The only way to win this Road Trip is to discover Essex’s best antiques.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: In Las Vegas they indulge in one of the most expensive beef burgers.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gino & Fred are excited to be heading to San Francisco for their very own Summer of Love.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Texas is a meat lovers paradise and Gordon is keen to show the Europhiles some of the best BBQ known to man.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: In Las Vegas they indulge in one of the most expensive beef burgers.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gino & Fred are excited to be heading to San Francisco for their very own Summer of Love.

programme.title: The Neighborhood with Nicole
programme.desc: We live like a local in The Hamptons. From paddle boarding the morning away to learning about art and history from the local experts we see everything the Hamptons has to offer. We top off the day with a classic float from the locals favorite spot.

programme.title: Toque 12
programme.desc: Phillip takes us to Spanish restaurant Catalunya, one of Wine & Dine Singapore’s top restaurants in 2013, helmed by Executive Chef Alain Devahive Toloso, previously of Michelin starred elBulli, to see just what makes this restaurant so special.

programme.title: A Taste of Italy with Nisha Katona
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Nisha Katona goes on a culinary journey to discover Italy's hidden foodie gems, learning the regional secrets that influence their dishes

programme.title: American Travelers
programme.desc: Dave and Kari visit Jonesborough, the oldest town in Tennessee, during the Story Telling Festival. Then they check out Pigeon Forge and the Dollywood Dream More Resort.

programme.title: It's a Beautiful World
programme.desc: On the shores of Lake Atitlán, fisherman Juan Baldomero shares his mission of preserving the lake through sustainable practices, with a hands-on fishing trip and a traditional tamale-making session.

programme.title: Riders of the Whistling Skull
programme.desc: The Three Mesquiteers appeared in several Republic Pictures during the 1930s, and this is considered one of their best. It's about a mysterious murder at an archeological expedition, which leads the three prairie pals into some dangerous territory. Can...

programme.title: Idaho
programme.desc: Western icon Roy Rogers, along with his trusty companion Trigger, are back for another adventure. This time, a respected judge is being framed for murder by a crooked saloon owner. Always the valiant champion, Rogers vows to clear the name of the judge...

programme.title: Brothers of the West
programme.desc: Tom Tyler plays Tom Wade, a range detective whose brother has been accused of robbery and murder. Wade has only one clue to prove his brothers innocence: a set of unusual tire tracks. This film was directed by Sam Katzman, who later became known as Jun...

programme.title: The Fighting Redhead
programme.desc: When a rustler named Faro kills one of his own henchmen and blames it on Sheila O'Conner, Red and Little Beaver set out to clear Sheila and to find evidence against Faro and his gang.

programme.title: Rawhide Rangers
programme.desc: Blackie's gang is creating havoc and the Ranger, Brand Calhoun and his brother go to investigate.

programme.title: Camel Train
programme.desc: In 1847, Lt. Edward Beale tries to promote the use of camels in the Southwest.

programme.title: The Bandits of Panamint
programme.desc: Two men running from a posse discover silver and must find a way to stake their claim without going to jail.

programme.title: An Eye For An Eye (1966)
programme.desc: A former bounty hunter teams up with a younger one to find the gang leader who murdered his wife and boy.

programme.title: Jane Got A Gun
programme.desc: A woman asks her ex-lover for help in order to save her outlaw husband from a gang out to kill him.

programme.title: The Spanish Grant
programme.desc: The Cartwrights strive to thwart the De La Cuesta family's land takeover.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: Bill goes after three men who forced him to accompany them on a bank robbery and framed him for it.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: Bill befriends an overeager young man who plans to challenge him in the upcoming horse race.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: Bill is accused of robbing a bank and shooting the banker; he's captured by a posse.

programme.title: Border River
programme.desc: A Confederate major and his men rob a U.S. mint, then go to Mexico to buy guns and ammo.

programme.title: Stranger on Horseback
programme.desc: A circuit judge (Joel McCrea) squares off against a ruthless cattle baron.

programme.title: Riffleman S1 Episode 12 - The Angry Gun
programme.desc: Lucas McCain attempts to help a weary, aging gunfighter who arrives in North Fork looking for a quiet life, only to find himself forced to defend the man against a relentless younger gunman seeking to build a reputation by killing a legend

programme.title: Rifleman S1E13 The Young Englishman
programme.desc: A young, naive Englishman named Algernon "Algy" Burton arrives in North Fork. Eager to experience the American West, he inadvertently gets involved with a group of dangerous men who take advantage of his lack of experience and naivety. Lucas McCain steps in to mentor the young man and help him survive the harsh realities of frontier life

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 3 Badge Without Honor
programme.desc: A retired lawman arrives in Virginia City, but his presence stirs up trouble when a vengeful outlaw recognizes him from his past. As the two prepare for a final, inevitable confrontation, the Cartwrights find themselves caught in the middle of a moral dilemma between upholding the law and personal justice.

programme.title: The Grand Duel-1971-Lee Van Cleef,,
programme.desc: An ex-sheriff protects a young fugitive framed for murder, helping him fend off bounty hunters while tracking down the powerful, corrupt brothers truly responsible for the crime

programme.title: Rifleman S1E15 The Pet
programme.desc: Mark finds a stray dog in the woods and brings it home, hoping to keep it as a pet. However, the dog turns out to be a vicious animal that had been attacking local livestock, leading the townspeople and Lucas to deal with the danger the dog poses to the community.

programme.title: Apache Rose
programme.desc: Roy is an oil prospector. His efforts to get drilling rights on an old Spanish land grant are countered by gamblers from an off-shore gambling boat determined to control the land (and oil) themselves.

programme.title: Lightnin' Bill Carson
programme.desc: A lawman captures the notorious "Pecos Kid", who is tried and hanged for his crimes--then starts to have doubts as to whether the Kid actually committed the crimes.

programme.title: The Bushwhackers 1952
programme.desc: In The Bushwhackers, John Ireland stars as a war-weary Confederate soldier who drifts west seeking peace, only to find violence waiting on the frontier. When ruthless land barons use guns and terror to drive settlers from their homes, he’s forced to take up arms once more. With Lon Chaney Jr. and Lawrence Tierney adding menace and intrigue, this tense Western delivers a hard-hitting tale of greed, justice, and a reluctant hero who can’t outrun the fight for what’s right.

programme.title: Annie Oakley - Annie Calls Her Shots
programme.desc: Cowboy Classics

programme.title: The Outlaw (1943) Colorized
programme.desc: Howard Hughes’ infamous Western The Outlaw blazes with passion, rivalry, and danger. When Billy the Kid (Jack Buetel) rides into town, he becomes entangled in a volatile triangle with gunslinger Doc Holliday (Walter Huston) and lawman Pat Garrett (Thomas Mitchell). But it’s the fiery beauty Rio (Jane Russell, in her breakout role) who sparks the most dangerous conflict of all. With smoldering romance, tense standoffs, and Hughes’ bold style, this legendary film pushed boundaries and made Hollywood history.
